title: ENT (Otolaryngology) Outpatient Clinic Patient Flow
des_qualification_note: All three required criteria satisfied from structural signals alone (discrete patients and staff, discrete events for arrival/registration/exam/discharge, simulated clinic-session clock). Both typical criteria also present (resource contention across residents/attendings/admin/rooms, stochastic arrivals and service times). The rubric qualified the entry even under thin sources — a useful validation.
summary_of_content_provenance: Thin entry. Mixed provenance: one first-party adjacent source (orthopedic clinic PMC paper — structurally transferable but different specialty); one second-party direct source (IEEE ENT clinic paper at University of Illinois Medical Center — paywalled, captured via search snippets). Two fetch attempts failed (MDPI ENT+surgery 403, AnyLogic outpatient case study 403) and would live in a deferred human_followup_queue. One rejected false positive (ENTIMOS — acronym match on 'ENT' but actually a Multiple Sclerosis infusion suite model; would live in a deferred rejected_candidate log). No model definitions found.
